code: def p(g):q=min(set(f:=sum(g,[]))-{0},key=f.count);r,c=zip(*[divmod(i,len(g[0]))for i,v in enumerate(f)if v==q]);return[x[min(c):max(c)+1]for x in g[min(r):max(r)+1]]

history.code: def p(g):q=min(set(f:=sum(g,[]))-{0},key=f.count);r,c=zip(*[(i,j)for i,r in enumerate(g)for j,v in enumerate(r)if v==q]);return[x[min(c):max(c)+1]for x in g[min(r):max(r)+1]]
def p(g):w=len(g[0]);q=min(set(f:=sum(g,[]))-{0},key=f.count);r,c=zip(*[(i//w,i%w)for i,v in enumerate(f)if v==q]);return[x[min(c):max(c)+1]for x in g[min(r):max(r)+1]]
